items.title: French minister moves to block US envoy Kushner from government access
items.dek: The minister says Charles Kushner, father of Trump's son-in-law Jared, had failed to explain US comments about violence in France.
items.body: The minister says Charles Kushner, father of Trump's son-in-law Jared, had failed to explain US comments about violence in France.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: More than 5,000 flights cancelled as US east coast digs out of record snow
items.dek: A major snowstorm walloped the US north-east, causing disruptions for millions and thousands of flight cancellations.
items.body: A major snowstorm walloped the US north-east, causing disruptions for millions and thousands of flight cancellations.
items.author: IriLine Desk
